message:
fix: code quality improvements across multiple packages

- robot/ack.go: Remove duplicate "> " in promptSuffixes array
- checkpoint/auto.go: Use log.Printf instead of fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr)
  per AGENTS.md logging guidelines
- robot/spawn.go: Fix pane ID format for tmux target (session:window.index)
- scanner/analysis.go: Respect UTF-8 boundaries in truncate function
- supervisor/chaos_test.go: Replace fixed sleep with polling for reliability

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
